title: splagchnizomai #4697
definition:
1) to be moved as to one's bowels, hence to be moved with compassion,
    have compassion (for the bowels were thought to be the seat of
    love and pity)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be moved as to one's bowels, hence to be moved with compassion,
    have compassion (for the bowels were thought to be the seat of
    love and pity)

    NASB:  to be moved in the inward parts, i.e. to feel compassion:
